title: Tunisian Jammy Cake
description: Moist and flavorful cake originating from Tunisia, made with jammy flavors and dense texture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine mushrooms, sugar, eggs, flour, and jammy flavors.
Mix well until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Transfer the cake to a wire rack to cool completely.
